name: Lost Crown of Besilmer
description:
This dwarven battle-helm consists of a sturdy open-faced steel helmet, decorated with a golden circlet above the brow from which seven small gold spikes project upward. You gain the following benefits while wearing the crown:
{"type": "list", "items": ["You have resistance to psychic damage.", "You have advantage on saving throws against effects that would charm you.", "You can use a bonus action to inspire one creature you can see that is within 60 feet of you and that can see or hear you. Once
